retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the function is a command-sending routine; retry logic is unrelated to refcount operations.

judge.reason: The primary purpose of ath12k_wmi_send_pdev_temperature_cmd is to allocate a WMI command buffer, fill it with temperature request data, send it over the WMI bus, and handle errors by freeing the buffer. The dev_kfree_skb call is merely internal cleanup on failure, not a reference-count operation exposing an object to the caller. The function does not manage any user-visible reference-counted object; it is a command-sending helper with no get/put/set semantics.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the function is a command-sending routine; retry logic is unrelated to refcount operations.
